'''旧暦11月13日'''は[[旧暦]][[11月 (旧暦)|11月]]の13日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[雄略天皇]]元年<!--（[[456年]]_月_日）--> - 第21代・[[雄略天皇]]が即位 * [[元禄]]8年<!--（[[1695年]]_月_日）--> - [[生類憐れみの令]]により武蔵・中野村に野犬を収容するための16万坪の「お犬小屋」を設置
== 誕生日 == * [[天保]]4年<!--（[[1833年]]_月_日）--> - [[英照皇太后]]（九条夙子）、[[孝明天皇]]の女御・[[明治天皇]]の嫡母（+ [[1897年]]） * [[明治]]4年<!--（[[1871年]]_月_日）--> - [[ヤマシタ・ヨシタロー]]（山下芳太郎）、[[カナモジカイ]]創立者（+ [[1923年]]）
== 忌日 == *（ [[1722年]]_月_日） - [[康熙帝]]、[[清]]の4代皇帝（* [[1654年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[11月12日 (旧暦)|11月12日]] 翌日[[11月14日 (旧暦)|11月14日]] - 前月[[10月13日 (旧暦)|10月13日]] 翌月[[12月13日 (旧暦)|12月13日]] *新暦[[11月13日]]
{{msg:stub}}

== 誕生日 == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1537年]][[12月15日]]） - [[足利義昭]]、[[室町幕府]]第15代[[征夷大将軍]]（+ [[1597年]]） * [[永禄]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1563年]][[11月28日]]） - [[細川忠興]]、[[武将]]・[[大名]]、[[小倉藩]]初代藩主（+ [[1646年]]{{Sfn|永尾|p=178}}） * [[明暦]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1656年]][[ 12月28日]]） - [[安積澹泊]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1738年]]） * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[12月24日]]） - [[ヤマシタ・ヨシタロー]]（山下芳太郎）、[[カナモジカイ]]創立者（+ [[1923年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天正]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1574年]][[11月26日]]） - [[小早川繁平]]、[[戦国大名]]（* [[1542年]]） * [[康熙]]61年（グレゴリオ暦[[1722年]][[12月20日]]） - [[康熙帝]]<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]]</ref>、[[清]]の4代皇帝（* [[1654年]]） * [[元治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1864年]][[12月11日]]） - [[福原元僴]]（福原越後）、[[長州藩]]家老（* [[1815年]]）

== 忌日 == * [[天正]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1574年]][[11月26日]]） - [[小早川繁平]]、[[戦国大名]]（* [[1542年]]） * [[康熙]]61年（グレゴリオ暦[[1722年]][[12月20日]]） - [[康熙帝]]<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]]</ref>、[[清]]の4代皇帝（* [[1654年]]） * [[元治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1864年]][[12月11日]]） - [[福原元僴]]（福原越後）、[[長州藩]]家老（* [[1815年]]）

== 誕生日 == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1537年]][[12月15日]]） - [[足利義昭]]、[[室町幕府]]第15代[[征夷大将軍]]（+ [[1597年]]） * [[永禄]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1563年]][[11月28日]]） - [[細川忠興]]、[[武将]]・[[大名]]、[[小倉藩]]初代藩主（+ [[1646年]]{{Sfn|永尾|p=178}}） * [[明暦]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1656年]][[ 12月28日]]） - [[安積澹泊]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1738年]]） * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[12月24日]]） - [[ヤマシタ・ヨシタロー]]（山下芳太郎）、[[カナモジカイ]]創立者（+ [[1923年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天正]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1574年]][[11月26日]]） - [[小早川繁平]]、[[戦国大名]]（* [[1542年]]） * [[康熙]]61年（グレゴリオ暦[[1722年]][[12月20日]]） - [[康熙帝]]<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]]</ref>、[[清]]の4代皇帝（* [[1654年]]） * [[元治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1864年]][[12月11日]]） - [[福原元僴]]（福原越後）、[[長州藩]]家老（* [[1815年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|12|11|14|10|13|12|11|1113}}

revision.text:
[[sn:November 13 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 13일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十三]] [[zh:十一月十三]] [[en:draft:November 13 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * [[雄略天皇]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[456]][[12月25日]]） - 第21代・[[雄略天皇]]が即位 * [[元禄]]8年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1695]][[12月18日]]） - [[生類憐れみの令]]により武蔵・中野村に野犬を収容するための16万坪の「お犬小屋」を設置 * [[黄帝紀元]]4609年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1912]][[1月1日]]） - [[中華民国 (1912年-1949年)|中華民国]]で旧暦から新暦に改暦、[[民国紀元]]の使用開始。
== Births == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1537]][[12月15日]]） - [[足利義昭]]、[[室町幕府]]第15代[[征夷大将軍]]（+ [[1597]]） * [[永禄]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1563]][[11月28日]]） - [[細川忠興]]、[[武将]]・[[大名]]、[[小倉藩]]初代藩主（+ [[1646]]{{Sfn|永尾|p=178}}） * [[明暦]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1656]][[ 12月28日]]） - [[安積澹泊]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1738]]） * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871]][[12月24日]]） - [[ヤマシタ・ヨシタロー]]（山下芳太郎）、[[カナモジカイ]]創立者（+ [[1923]]）
== Deaths == * [[天正]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1574]][[11月26日]]） - [[小早川繁平]]、[[戦国大名]]（* [[1542]]） * [[康熙]]61年（グレゴリオ暦[[1722]][[12月20日]]） - [[康熙帝]]<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]]</ref>、[[清]]の4代皇帝（* [[1654]]） * [[元治]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1864]][[12月11日]]） - [[福原元僴]]（福原越後）、[[長州藩]]家老（* [[1815]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|12|11|14|10|13|12|11|1113}}

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[sn:November 13 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 13일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十三]] [[zh:十一月十三]] [[en:draft:November 13 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * [[雄略天皇]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[456]][[12月25日]]） - 第21代・[[雄略天皇]]が即位 * [[元禄]]8th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1695]][[12月18日]]） - [[生類憐れみの令]]により武蔵・中野村に野犬を収容するための16万坪の「お犬小屋」を設置 * [[黄帝紀元]]4609th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1912]][[1月1日]]） - [[中華民国 (1912年-1949年)|中華民国]]で旧暦から新暦に改暦、[[民国紀元]]の使用開始。
== Births == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]6th year（ユリウス暦[[1537]][[12月15日]]） - [[足利義昭]]、[[室町幕府]]第15代[[征夷大将軍]]（+ [[1597]]） * [[永禄]]6th year（ユリウス暦[[1563]][[11月28日]]） - [[細川忠興]]、[[武将]]・[[大名]]、[[小倉藩]]初代藩主（+ [[1646]]{{Sfn|永尾|p=178}}） * [[明暦]]2nd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1656]][[ 12月28日]]） - [[安積澹泊]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1738]]） * [[明治]]4th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1871]][[12月24日]]） - [[ヤマシタ・ヨシタロー]]（山下芳太郎）、[[カナモジカイ]]創立者（+ [[1923]]）
== Deaths == * [[天正]]2nd year（ユリウス暦[[1574]][[11月26日]]） - [[小早川繁平]]、[[戦国大名]]（* [[1542]]） * [[康熙]]61年（グレゴリオ暦[[1722]][[12月20日]]） - [[康熙帝]]<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]]</ref>、[[清]]の4代皇帝（* [[1654]]） * [[元治]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1864]][[12月11日]]） - [[福原元僴]]（福原越後）、[[長州藩]]家老（* [[1815]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|12|11|14|10|13|12|11|1113}}

revision.comment: fixing the spacing and capitalization
revision.text:
[[sn:November 13 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 13일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十三]] [[zh:十一月十三]] [[en:draft:November 13 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * [[雄略天皇]]1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[456]][[12月25日]]） - 第21代・[[雄略天皇]]が即位 * [[Genroku]]8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1695]][[12月18日]]） - [[生類憐れみの令]]により武蔵・中野村に野犬を収容するための16万坪の「お犬小屋」を設置 * [[黄帝紀元]]4609th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1912]][[1月1日]]） - [[中華民国 (1912年-1949年)|中華民国]]で旧暦から新暦に改暦、[[民国紀元]]の使用開始。
== Births == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1537]][[12月15日]]） - [[足利義昭]]、[[室町幕府]]第15代[[征夷大将軍]]（+ [[1597]]） * [[永禄]]6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1563]][[11月28日]]） - [[細川忠興]]、[[武将]]・[[大名]]、[[小倉藩]]初代藩主（+ [[1646]]{{Sfn|永尾|p=178}}） * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}}2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1656]][[ 12月28日]]） - [[安積澹泊]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1738]]） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]]4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]][[12月24日]]） - [[ヤマシタ・ヨシタロー]]（山下芳太郎）、[[カナモジカイ]]創立者（+ [[1923]]）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}}2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1574]][[11月26日]]） - [[小早川繁平]]、[[戦国大名]]（* [[1542]]） * [[康熙]]61年 ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1722]][[12月20日]]） - [[康熙帝]]<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]]</ref>、[[清]]の4代皇帝（* [[1654]]） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}}1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]][[12月11日]]） - [[福原元僴]]（福原越後）、[[長州藩]]家老（* [[1815]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|12|11|14|10|13|12|11|1113}}

[[Category:New]] [[sn:ovember 13 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[sn:November 13 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 13일]] [[sn:November 13 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 13일]] [[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]][[Category: Lunar Calendar Days]][[Category: Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:November 13 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 13일]] [[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]][[Category: Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:November 13 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:November 13 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:qq]] ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}}

== Events == * [[雄略天皇]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[456]] [[December 25]] ） - 第21代・[[雄略天皇]] が即位 * [[Genroku]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1695]] [[December 18]] ） - [[生類憐れみの令]] により武蔵・中野村に野犬を収容するための16万坪の「お犬小屋」を設置 * [[黄帝紀元]] 4609th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1912]] [[January 1]] ） - [[中華民国 (1912年-1949年)|中華民国]] で旧暦から新暦に改暦、[[民国紀元]] の使用開始。
== Births == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1537]] [[December 15]] ） - [[足利義昭]] 、[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 第15代[[征夷大将軍]] （+ [[1597]] ） * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1563]] [[November 28]] ） - [[細川忠興]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[大名]] 、[[小倉藩]] 初代藩主（+ [[1646]] {{Sfn|永尾|p=178}} ） * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1656]] [[ 12月28日]] ） - [[安積澹泊]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1738]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 24]] ） - [[ヤマシタ・ヨシタロー]] （山下芳太郎）、[[カナモジカイ]] 創立者（+ [[1923]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1574]] [[November 26]] ） - [[小早川繁平]] 、{{ill|Sengoku Daimyo|ja|戦国大名|de|Sengoku-Daimyō}} （* [[1542]] ） * [[Kangxi]] 61年 ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1722]] [[December 20]] ） - [[Kangxi帝]] <ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]] </ref>、[[清]] の4代皇帝（* [[1654]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[December 11]] ） - [[福原元僴]] （福原越後）、[[Chōshū Domain]] 家老（* [[1815]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==

[[sn:November 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 13일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十三]] [[zh:十一月十三]] [[en:draft:November 13 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[雄略天皇]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[456]] [[December 25]] ） - 第21代・[[雄略天皇]] が即位 * [[Genroku]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1695]] [[December 18]] ） - [[生類憐れみの令]] により武蔵・中野村に野犬を収容するための16万坪の「お犬小屋」を設置 * [[黄帝紀元]] 4609th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1912]] [[January 1]] ） - [[中華民国 (1912年-1949年)|中華民国]] で旧暦から新暦に改暦、[[民国紀元]] の使用開始。
== Births == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1537]] [[December 15]] ） - [[Ashikaga Yoshiaki]] 、[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 第15代[[Shogun]] （+ [[1597]] ） * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1563]] [[November 28]] ） - [[細川忠興]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[大名]] 、[[小倉藩]] 初代藩主（+ [[1646]] {{Sfn|永尾|p=178}} ） * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1656]] [[ 12月28日]] ） - [[安積澹泊]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1738]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 24]] ） - [[ヤマシタ・ヨシタロー]] （山下芳太郎）、[[カナモジカイ]] 創立者（+ [[1923]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1574]] [[November 26]] ） - [[小早川繁平]] 、{{ill|Sengoku Daimyo|ja|戦国大名|de|Sengoku-Daimyō}} （* [[1542]] ） * [[Kangxi]] 61年 ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1722]] [[December 20]] ） - [[Kangxi帝]] <ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[Encyclopedia Britannica|Encyclopædia Britannica]] </ref>、[[清]] の4代Emperor（* [[1654]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[December 11]] ） - [[福原元僴]] （福原越後）、[[Chōshū Domain]] 家老（* [[1815]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|12|11|14|10|13|12|11|1113}}

[[sn:November 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 13일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十三]] [[zh:十一月十三]] [[en:draft:November 13 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .

== Births == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1537]] [[December 15]] ） - [[Ashikaga Yoshiaki]] 、[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 第15代[[Shogun]] （+ [[1597]] ） * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1563]] [[November 28]] ） - [[細川忠興]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[大名]] 、[[小倉藩]] 初代藩主（+ [[1646]] {{Sfn|永尾|p=178}} ） * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1656]] [[ 12月28日]] ） - [[安積澹泊]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1738]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 24]] ） - [[ヤマシタ・ヨシタロー]] （山下芳太郎）、[[カナモジカイ]] 創立者（+ [[1923]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1574]] [[November 26]] ） - [[小早川繁平]] 、{{ill|Sengoku Daimyo|ja|戦国大名|de|Sengoku-Daimyō}} （* [[1542]] ） * [[Kangxi]] 61年 ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1722]] [[December 20]] ） - [[Kangxi帝]] <ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[Encyclopedia Britannica|Encyclopædia Britannica]] </ref>、[[清]] の4代Emperor（* [[1654]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[December 11]] ） - [[福原元僴]] （福原越後）、[[Chōshū Domain]] 家老（* [[1815]] ）

[[sn:November 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 13일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十三]] [[zh:十一月十三]] [[en:draft:November 13 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[雄略天皇]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[456]] [[December 25]] ） - 第21代・[[雄略天皇]] が即位 * [[Genroku]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1695]] [[December 18]] ） - [[生類憐れみの令]] により武蔵・中野村に野犬を収容するための16万坪の「お犬小屋」を設置 * [[黄帝紀元]] 4609th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1912]] [[January 1]] ） - [[中華民国 (1912年-1949年)|中華民国]] で旧暦から新暦に改暦、[[民国紀元]] の使用開始。
== Births == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1537]] [[December 15]] ） - [[Ashikaga Yoshiaki]] 、[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 第15代[[Shogun]] （+ [[1597]] ） * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1563]] [[November 28]] ） - [[細川忠興]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[大名]] 、[[小倉藩]] 初代藩主（+ [[1646]] {{Sfn|永尾|p=178}} ） * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1656]] [[ 12月28日]] ） - [[安積澹泊]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1738]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 24]] ） - [[ヤマシタ・ヨシタロー]] （山下芳太郎）、[[カナモジカイ]] 創立者（+ [[1923]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1574]] [[November 26]] ） - [[小早川繁平]] 、{{ill|Sengoku Daimyo|ja|戦国大名|de|Sengoku-Daimyō}} （* [[1542]] ） * [[Kangxi]] 61年 ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1722]] [[December 20]] ） - [[Kangxi帝]] <ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[Encyclopedia Britannica|Encyclopædia Britannica]] </ref>、[[清]] の4代Emperor（* [[1654]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[December 11]] ） - [[福原元僴]] （福原越後）、[[Chōshū Domain]] 家老（* [[1815]] ）
== Commemorations ==== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|12|11|14|10|13|12|11|1113}}

[[sn:November 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 13일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十三]] [[zh:十一月十三]] [[en:draft:November 13 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .

== Births == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1537]] [[December 15]] ） - [[Ashikaga Yoshiaki]] 、[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 第15代[[Shogun]] （+ [[1597]] ） * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1563]] [[November 28]] ） - [[細川忠興]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[大名]] 、[[小倉藩]] 初代藩主（+ [[1646]] {{Sfn|永尾|p=178}} ） * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1656]] [[ 12月28日]] ） - [[安積澹泊]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1738]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 24]] ） - [[ヤマシタ・ヨシタロー]] （山下芳太郎）、[[カナモジカイ]] 創立者（+ [[1923]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1574]] [[November 26]] ） - [[小早川繁平]] 、{{ill|Sengoku Daimyo|ja|戦国大名|de|Sengoku-Daimyō}} （* [[1542]] ） * [[Kangxi]] 61年 ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1722]] [[December 20]] ） - [[Kangxi帝]] <ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[Encyclopedia Britannica|Encyclopædia Britannica]] </ref>、[[清]] の4代Emperor（* [[1654]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[December 11]] ） - [[福原元僴]] （福原越後）、[[Chōshū Domain]] 家老（* [[1815]] ）

revision.comment: Text replacement - "1年" to "1st year "
revision.text:
[[sn:November 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 13일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十三]] [[zh:十一月十三]] [[en:draft:November 13 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[雄略天皇]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[456]] [[December 25]] ） - 第21代・[[雄略天皇]] が即位 * [[Genroku]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1695]] [[December 18]] ） - [[生類憐れみの令]] により武蔵・中野村に野犬を収容するための16万坪の「お犬小屋」を設置 * [[黄帝紀元]] 4609th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1912]] [[January 1]] ） - [[中華民国 (1912年-1949年)|中華民国]] で旧暦から新暦に改暦、[[民国紀元]] の使用開始。
== Births == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1537]] [[December 15]] ） - [[Ashikaga Yoshiaki]] 、[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 第15代[[Shogun]] （+ [[1597]] ） * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1563]] [[November 28]] ） - [[細川忠興]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[大名]] 、[[小倉藩]] 初代藩主（+ [[1646]] {{Sfn|永尾|p=178}} ） * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1656]] [[ 12月28日]] ） - [[安積澹泊]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1738]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 24]] ） - [[ヤマシタ・ヨシタロー]] （山下芳太郎）、[[カナモジカイ]] 創立者（+ [[1923]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1574]] [[November 26]] ） - [[小早川繁平]] 、{{ill|Sengoku Daimyo|ja|戦国大名|de|Sengoku-Daimyō}} （* [[1542]] ） * [[Kangxi]] 61st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1722]] [[December 20]] ） - [[Kangxi帝]] <ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[Encyclopedia Britannica|Encyclopædia Britannica]] </ref>、[[清]] の4代Emperor（* [[1654]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[December 11]] ） - [[福原元僴]] （福原越後）、[[Chōshū Domain]] 家老（* [[1815]] ）
== Commemorations == == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|12|11|14|10|13|12|11|1113}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "|天正}}" to "|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}}"
revision.text:
[[sn:November 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 13일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十三]] [[zh:十一月十三]] [[en:draft:November 13 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[雄略天皇]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[456]] [[December 25]] ） - 第21代・[[雄略天皇]] が即位 * [[Genroku]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1695]] [[December 18]] ） - [[生類憐れみの令]] により武蔵・中野村に野犬を収容するための16万坪の「お犬小屋」を設置 * [[黄帝紀元]] 4609th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1912]] [[January 1]] ） - [[中華民国 (1912nd year -1949th year )|中華民国]] で旧暦から新暦に改暦、[[民国紀元]] の使用開始。
== Births == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1537]] [[December 15]] ） - [[Ashikaga Yoshiaki]] 、[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 第15代[[Shogun]] （+ [[1597]] ） * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1563]] [[November 28]] ） - [[細川忠興]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[大名]] 、[[小倉藩]] 初代藩主（+ [[1646]] {{Sfn|永尾|p=178}} ） * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1656]] [[ 12月28日]] ） - [[安積澹泊]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1738]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 24]] ） - [[ヤマシタ・ヨシタロー]] （山下芳太郎）、[[カナモジカイ]] 創立者（+ [[1923]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1574]] [[November 26]] ） - [[小早川繁平]] 、{{ill|Sengoku Daimyo|ja|戦国大名|de|Sengoku-Daimyō}} （* [[1542]] ） * [[Kangxi]] 61st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1722]] [[December 20]] ） - [[Kangxi帝]] <ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[Encyclopedia Britannica|Encyclopædia Britannica]] </ref>、[[清]] の4代Emperor（* [[1654]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[December 11]] ） - [[福原元僴]] （福原越後）、[[Chōshū Domain]] 家老（* [[1815]] ）
== Commemorations == == See Also ==

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[清]]" to "[[Qing dynasty]]"
revision.text:
[[sn:November 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 13일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十三]] [[zh:十一月十三]] [[en:draft:November 13 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[Emperor Yūryaku]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[456]] [[December 25]] ） - 第21代・[[Emperor Yūryaku]] が即位 * [[Genroku]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1695]] [[December 18]] ） - [[生類憐れみの令]] により武蔵・中野村に野犬を収容するための16万坪の「お犬小屋」を設置 * [[黄帝紀元]] 4609th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1912]] [[January 1]] ） - [[中華民国 (1912nd year -1949th year )|中華民国]] で旧暦から新暦に改暦、[[民国紀元]] の使用開始。
== Births == * [[Tenbun]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1537]] [[December 15]] ） - [[Ashikaga Yoshiaki]] 、[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 第15代[[Shogun]] （+ [[1597]] ） * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1563]] [[November 28]] ） - [[細川忠興]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[Daimyo]] 、[[小倉藩]] 初代藩主（+ [[1646]] {{Sfn|永尾|p=178}} ） * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1656]] [[ 12月28日]] ） - [[安積澹泊]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1738]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 24]] ） - [[ヤマシタ・ヨシタロー]] （山下芳太郎）、[[カナモジカイ]] 創立者（+ [[1923]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1574]] [[November 26]] ） - [[小早川繁平]] 、{{ill|Sengoku Daimyo|ja|戦国大名|de|Sengoku-Daimyō}} （* [[1542]] ） * [[Kangxi]] 61st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1722]] [[December 20]] ） - [[Kangxi帝]] <ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[Encyclopedia Britannica|Encyclopædia Britannica]] </ref>、[[Qing dynasty]] の4代Emperor（* [[1654]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[December 11]] ） - [[福原元僴]] （福原越後）、[[Chōshū Domain]] 家老（* [[1815]] ）
== Commemorations == == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|12|11|14|10|13|12|11|1113}}

[[sn:November 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 13일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十三]] [[zh:十一月十三]] [[en:draft:November 13 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[Emperor Yūryaku]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[456]] [[December 25]] ） - 第21代・[[Emperor Yūryaku]] が即位 * [[Genroku]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1695]] [[December 18]] ） - [[生類憐れみの令]] により武蔵・中野村に野犬を収容するための16万坪の「お犬小屋」を設置 * [[黄帝紀元]] 4609th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1912]] [[January 1]] ） - [[中華民国 (1912nd year -1949th year )|中華民国]] で旧暦から新暦に改暦、[[民国紀元]] の使用開始。
== Births == * [[Tenbun]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1537]] [[December 15]] ） - [[Ashikaga Yoshiaki]] 、[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 第15代[[Shogun]] （+ [[1597]] ） * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1563]] [[November 28]] ） - [[細川忠興]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[Daimyo]] 、[[小倉藩]] 初代藩主（+ [[1646]] {{Sfn|永尾|p=178}} ） * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1656]] [[ 12月28日]] ） - [[安積澹泊]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1738]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 24]] ） - [[ヤマシタ・ヨシタロー]] （山下芳太郎）、[[カナモジカイ]] 創立者（+ [[1923]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1574]] [[November 26]] ） - [[小早川繁平]] 、{{ill|Sengoku Daimyo|ja|戦国大名|de|Sengoku-Daimyō}} （* [[1542]] ） * [[Kangxi]] 61st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1722]] [[December 20]] ） - [[Kangxi帝]] <ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[Encyclopedia Britannica|Encyclopædia Britannica]] </ref>、[[Qing dynasty]] の4代Emperor（* [[1654]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[December 11]] ） - [[福原元僴]] （福原越後）、[[Chōshū Domain]] 家老（* [[1815]] ）

revision.text:
[[sn:November 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 13일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十三]] [[zh:十一月十三]] [[en:draft:November 13 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[Emperor Yūryaku]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[456]] [[December 25]] ） - 第21代・[[Emperor Yūryaku]] が即位 * [[Genroku]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1695]] [[December 18]] ） - [[生類憐れみの令]] により武蔵・中野村に野犬を収容するための16万坪の「お犬小屋」を設置 * [[黄帝紀元]] 4609th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1912]] [[January 1]] ） - [[中華民国 (1912nd year -1949th year )|中華民国]] で旧暦から新暦に改暦、[[民国紀元]] の使用開始。
== Births == * [[Tenbun]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1537]] [[December 15]] ） - [[Ashikaga Yoshiaki]] 、[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 第15代[[Shogun]] （+ [[1597]] ） * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1563]] [[November 28]] ） - [[細川忠興]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[Daimyo]] 、[[小倉藩]] 初代藩主（+ [[1646]] {{Sfn|永尾|p=178}} ） * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1656]] [[ 12月28日]] ） - [[安積澹泊]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1738]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 24]] ） - [[ヤマシタ・ヨシタロー]] （山下芳太郎）、[[カナモジカイ]] 創立者（+ [[1923]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1574]] [[November 26]] ） - [[小早川繁平]] 、{{ill|Sengoku Daimyo|ja|戦国大名|de|Sengoku-Daimyō}} （* [[1542]] ） * [[Kangxi]] 61st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1722]] [[December 20]] ） - [[Kangxi帝]] <ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[Encyclopedia Britannica|Encyclopædia Britannica]] </ref>、[[Qing dynasty]] の4代Emperor（* [[1654]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[December 11]] ） - [[福原元僴]] （福原越後）、[[Chōshū Domain]] 家老（* [[1815]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|12|11|14|10|13|12|11|1113}}

[[sn:November 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 13일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十三]] [[zh:十一月十三]] [[en:draft:November 13 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[Emperor Yūryaku]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[456]] [[December 25]] ） - 第21代・[[Emperor Yūryaku]] が即位 * [[Genroku]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1695]] [[December 18]] ） - [[生類憐れみの令]] により武蔵・中野村に野犬を収容するための16万坪の「お犬小屋」を設置 * [[黄帝紀元]] 4609th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1912]] [[January 1]] ） - [[中華民国 (1912nd year -1949th year )|中華民国]] で旧暦から新暦に改暦、[[民国紀元]] の使用開始。
== Births == * [[Tenbun]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1537]] [[December 15]] ） - [[Ashikaga Yoshiaki]] 、[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 第15代[[Shogun]] （+ [[1597]] ） * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1563]] [[November 28]] ） - [[細川忠興]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[Daimyo]] 、[[小倉藩]] 初代藩主（+ [[1646]] {{Sfn|永尾|p=178}} ） * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1656]] [[ 12月28日]] ） - [[安積澹泊]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1738]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 24]] ） - [[ヤマシタ・ヨシタロー]] （山下芳太郎）、[[カナモジカイ]] 創立者（+ [[1923]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1574]] [[November 26]] ） - [[小早川繁平]] 、{{ill|Sengoku Daimyo|ja|戦国大名|de|Sengoku-Daimyō}} （* [[1542]] ） * [[Kangxi]] 61st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1722]] [[December 20]] ） - [[Kangxi帝]] <ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[Encyclopedia Britannica|Encyclopædia Britannica]] </ref>、[[Qing dynasty]] の4代Emperor（* [[1654]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[December 11]] ） - [[福原元僴]] （福原越後）、[[Chōshū Domain]] 家老（* [[1815]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|12|11|14|10|13|12|11|1113}}

[[sn:November 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 13일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十三]] [[zh:十一月十三]] [[en:draft:November 13 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[Emperor Yūryaku]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[456]] [[December 25]] ） - 第21代・[[Emperor Yūryaku]] が即位 * [[Genroku]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1695]] [[December 18]] ） - [[生類憐れみの令]] により武蔵・中野村に野犬を収容するための16万坪の「お犬小屋」を設置 * [[黄帝紀元]] 4609th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1912]] [[January 1]] ） - [[中華民国 (1912nd year -1949th year )|中華民国]] で旧暦から新暦に改暦、[[民国紀元]] の使用開始。
== Births == * [[Tenbun]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1537]] [[December 15]] ） - [[Ashikaga Yoshiaki]] 、[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 第15代[[Shogun]] （+ [[1597]] ） * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1563]] [[November 28]] ） - [[細川忠興]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[Daimyo]] 、[[小倉藩]] 初代藩主（+ [[1646]] {{Sfn|永尾|p=178}} ） * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1656]] [[ 12月28日]] ） - [[安積澹泊]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1738]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 24]] ） - [[ヤマシタ・ヨシタロー]] （山下芳太郎）、[[カナモジカイ]] 創立者（+ [[1923]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1574]] [[November 26]] ） - [[小早川繁平]] 、{{ill|Sengoku Daimyo|ja|戦国大名|de|Sengoku-Daimyō}} （* [[1542]] ） * [[Kangxi]] 61st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1722]] [[December 20]] ） - [[Kangxi帝]] <ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[Encyclopedia Britannica|Encyclopædia Britannica]] </ref>、[[Qing dynasty]] の4代Emperor（* [[1654]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[December 11]] ） - [[福原元僴]] （福原越後）、[[Chōshū Domain]] 家老（* [[1815]] ）

[[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十三]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[Emperor Yūryaku]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[456]] [[December 25]] ） - 第21代・[[Emperor Yūryaku]] が即位 * [[Genroku]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1695]] [[December 18]] ） - [[生類憐れみの令]] により武蔵・中野村に野犬を収容するための16万坪の「お犬小屋」を設置 * [[黄帝紀元]] 4609th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1912]] [[January 1]] ） - [[中華民国 (1912nd year -1949th year )|中華民国]] で旧暦から新暦に改暦、[[民国紀元]] の使用開始。
== Births == * [[Tenbun]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1537]] [[December 15]] ） - [[Ashikaga Yoshiaki]] 、[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 第15代[[Shogun]] （+ [[1597]] ） * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1563]] [[November 28]] ） - [[細川忠興]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[Daimyo]] 、[[小倉藩]] 初代藩主（+ [[1646]] {{Sfn|永尾|p=178}} ） * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1656]] [[ 12月28日]] ） - [[安積澹泊]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1738]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 24]] ） - [[ヤマシタ・ヨシタロー]] （山下芳太郎）、[[カナモジカイ]] 創立者（+ [[1923]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1574]] [[November 26]] ） - [[小早川繁平]] 、{{ill|Sengoku Daimyo|ja|戦国大名|de|Sengoku-Daimyō}} （* [[1542]] ） * [[Kangxi]] 61st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1722]] [[December 20]] ） - [[Kangxi帝]] <ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[Encyclopedia Britannica|Encyclopædia Britannica]] </ref>、[[Qing dynasty]] の4代Emperor（* [[1654]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[December 11]] ） - [[福原元僴]] （福原越後）、[[Chōshū Domain]] 家老（* [[1815]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|12|11|14|10|13|12|11|1113}}
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十三]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十三]]
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}}
{{draft categories| [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunisolar November]] [[Category:Taian]] [[Category:Days 13 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:return the see also]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[sn:November 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 13일]] [[ja:11月13日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十一月十三]] [[en:draft:November 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[en:11月13日 (旧暦)]] [[sn:ovember 13 (Lunisolar)]]

[[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十三]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November|12=draft}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft}} .
== Events == * [[Emperor Yūryaku]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[456]] [[December 25]] ） - 第21代・[[Emperor Yūryaku]] が即位 * [[Genroku]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1695]] [[December 18]] ） - [[生類憐れみの令]] により武蔵・中野村に野犬を収容するための16万坪の「お犬小屋」を設置 * [[黄帝紀元]] 4609th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1912]] [[January 1]] ） - [[中華民国 (1912nd year -1949th year )|中華民国]] で旧暦から新暦に改暦、[[民国紀元]] の使用開始。
== Births == * [[Tenbun]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1537]] [[December 15]] ） - [[Ashikaga Yoshiaki]] 、[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 第15代[[Shogun]] （+ [[1597]] ） * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1563]] [[November 28]] ） - [[細川忠興]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将|12=draft}} ・[[Daimyo]] 、[[小倉藩]] 初代藩主（+ [[1646]] {{Sfn|永尾|p=178}} ） * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦|12=draft}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1656]] [[ 12月28日]] ） - [[安積澹泊]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=draft}} （+ [[1738]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 24]] ） - [[ヤマシタ・ヨシタロー]] （山下芳太郎）、[[カナモジカイ]] 創立者（+ [[1923]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1574]] [[November 26]] ） - [[小早川繁平]] 、{{ill|Sengoku Daimyo|ja|戦国大名|de|Sengoku-Daimyō|12=draft}} （* [[1542]] ） * [[Kangxi]] 61st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1722]] [[December 20]] ） - [[Kangxi帝]] <ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[Encyclopedia Britannica|Encyclopædia Britannica]] </ref>、[[Qing dynasty]] の4代Emperor（* [[1654]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治|12=draft}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[December 11]] ） - [[福原元僴]] （福原越後）、[[Chōshū Domain]] 家老（* [[1815]] ）

== Events == * [[Emperor Yūryaku]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[456]] [[December 25]] ） - 第21代・[[Emperor Yūryaku]] が即位 * [[Genroku]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1695]] [[December 18]] ） - [[生類憐れみの令]] により武蔵・中野村に野犬を収容するための16万坪の「お犬小屋」を設置 * [[黄帝紀元]] 4609th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1912]] [[January 1]] ） - [[中華民国 (1912nd year -1949th year )|中華民国]] で旧暦から新暦に改暦、[[民国紀元]] の使用開始。
== Births == * [[Tenbun]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1537]] [[December 15]] ） - [[Ashikaga Yoshiaki]] 、[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 第15代[[Shogun]] （+ [[1597]] ） * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1563]] [[November 28]] ） - [[細川忠興]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将|12=draft}} ・[[Daimyo]] 、[[小倉藩]] 初代藩主（+ [[1646]] {{Sfn|永尾|p=178}} ） * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦|12=draft}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1656]] [[ 12月28日]] ） - [[安積澹泊]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=draft}} （+ [[1738]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 24]] ） - [[ヤマシタ・ヨシタロー]] （山下芳太郎）、[[カナモジカイ]] 創立者（+ [[1923]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1574]] [[November 26]] ） - [[小早川繁平]] 、{{ill|Sengoku Daimyo|ja|戦国大名|de|Sengoku-Daimyō|12=draft}} （* [[1542]] ） * [[Kangxi]] 61st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1722]] [[December 20]] ） - [[Kangxi帝]] <ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[Encyclopedia Britannica|Encyclopædia Britannica]] </ref>、[[Qing dynasty]] の4代Emperor（* [[1654]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治|12=draft}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[December 11]] ） - [[福原元僴]] （福原越後）、[[Chōshū Domain]] 家老（* [[1815]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==

[[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十三]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 13''' is the 13th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11th Month (Old Calendar)}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|Old Calendar}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyo|ja|Rokuyo}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|Taian}}.
== Events == * [[Emperor Yūryaku]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[456]] [[December 25]]) – In the 1st year of Emperor Yūryaku, the 21st Emperor Yūryaku acceded to the throne. * [[Genroku]] 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1695]] [[December 18]]) – In accordance with the Edict on Compassion for Living Beings, a doghouse covering 160,000 tsubo was constructed in Musashi-Nakano Village to shelter stray dogs. * [[黄帝紀元]] 4609th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1912]] [[January 1]]) – In the Republic of China, the calendar was reformed from the lunisolar to the Gregorian system and the Minguo era began.
== Births == * [[Tenbun]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1537]] [[December 15]]) – Ashikaga Yoshiaki, the 15th Shogun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (d. [[1597]]). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1563]] [[November 28]]) – Hosokawa Tadaoki, military commander ({{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|Military Commander}}) and Daimyo; the first lord of the Ogura Domain (d. [[1646]] {{Sfn|永尾|p=178}}). * {{ill|Meireki|ja|Meireki}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1656]] [[December 28]]) – Azumi Tanpaku, Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|Confucian Scholar|zh|儒生}}) (d. [[1738]]). * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 24]]) – Yamashita Yoshitaro ({{ill|Yamashita Yoshitaro|ja|山下芳太郎}}), founder of Kanamojikai ({{ill|Kanamojikai|ja|カナモジカイ}}) (d. [[1923]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|Tenshō}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1574]] [[November 26]]) – Kobayakawa Shigehira, Sengoku daimyo (born [[1542]]). * [[Kangxi]] 61st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1722]] [[December 20]]) – Kangxi Emperor,<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] {{ill|Encyclopædia Britannica|ja|Encyclopædia Britannica}}</ref> the 4th Emperor of the Qing dynasty (born [[1654]]). * {{ill|Genji|ja|Genji}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[December 11]]) – Fukuhara Motomasa (also known as Fukuhara Echigo), chief retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born [[1815]]).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|12|11|14|10|13|12|11|1113}}
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十三]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十三]]

revision.text:
{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月13日'''は[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の13日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[雄略天皇]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[456年]][[12月25日]]） - 第21代・[[雄略天皇]]が即位 * [[元禄]]8年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1695年]][[12月18日]]） - [[生類憐れみの令]]により武蔵・中野村に野犬を収容するための16万坪の「お犬小屋」を設置 * [[黄帝紀元]]4609年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1912年]][[1月1日]]） - [[中華民国 (1912年-1949年)|中華民国]]で旧暦から新暦に改暦、[[民国紀元]]の使用開始。
== 誕生日 == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1537年]][[12月15日]]） - [[足利義昭]]、[[室町幕府]]第15代[[征夷大将軍]]（+ [[1597年]]） * [[永禄]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1563年]][[11月28日]]） - [[細川忠興]]、[[武将]]・[[大名]]、[[小倉藩]]初代藩主（+ [[1646年]]{{Sfn|永尾|p=178}}） * [[明暦]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1656年]][[ 12月28日]]） - [[安積澹泊]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1738年]]） * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[12月24日]]） - [[ヤマシタ・ヨシタロー]]（山下芳太郎）、[[カナモジカイ]]創立者（+ [[1923年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天正]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1574年]][[11月26日]]） - [[小早川繁平]]、[[戦国大名]]（* [[1542年]]） * [[康熙]]61年（グレゴリオ暦[[1722年]][[12月20日]]） - [[康熙帝]]<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]]</ref>、[[清]]の4代皇帝（* [[1654年]]） * [[元治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1864年]][[12月11日]]） - [[福原元僴]]（福原越後）、[[長州藩]]家老（* [[1815年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|12|11|14|10|13|12|11|1113}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 13일]][[zh_min_nan:11 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月十三]][[zh:十一月十三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840090]] Wikidata name: 13th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 13|qq=November 13}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 13''' is the 13th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11th Month (Old Calendar)|1=November (Lunisolar)|2=ja|3=11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|Old Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyo|ja|Rokuyo|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|Taian|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Yūryaku|Emperor Yūryaku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:456|456]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – In the 1st year of Emperor Yūryaku, the 21st Emperor Yūryaku acceded to the throne. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1695|1695]] [[:en:December 18|December 18]]) – In accordance with the Edict on Compassion for Living Beings, a doghouse covering 160,000 tsubo was constructed in Musashi-Nakano Village to shelter stray dogs. * {{ill|Huangdi Era|ja|黄帝紀元|nl|Chinese_jaartelling|zh-min-nan|Hông-tè_kì-goân|zh-classical|黃帝紀元|zh|黄帝纪元|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Huangdi Era|qq=|1=Huangdi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3476000}} 4609th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1912|1912]] [[:en:January 1|January 1]]) – In the Republic of China, the calendar was reformed from the lunisolar to the Gregorian system and the Minguo era began.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1537|1537]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]) – Ashikaga Yoshiaki, the 15th Shogun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (d. [[:en:1597|1597]]). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1563|1563]] [[:en:November 28|November 28]]) – Hosokawa Tadaoki, military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|Military Commander|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and Daimyo; the first lord of the Ogura Domain (d. [[:en:1646|1646]] {{Sfn|永尾|p=178|qq=}}). * {{ill|Meireki|ja|Meireki|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meireki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1656|1656]] [[:en:December 28|December 28]]) – Azumi Tanpaku, Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|Confucian Scholar|zh|儒生|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) (d. [[:en:1738|1738]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Yamashita Yoshitaro ({{ill|Yamashita Yoshitaro|ja|山下芳太郎|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamashita Yoshitaro|qq=|1=Yoshitarō Yamashita|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6282623}}), founder of Kanamojikai ({{ill|Kanamojikai|ja|カナモジカイ|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanamojikai|qq=|1=Kanamozikai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11294454}}) (d. [[:en:1923|1923]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|Tenshō|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1574|1574]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]]) – Kobayakawa Shigehira, Sengoku daimyo (born [[:en:1542|1542]]). * [[:en:Kangxi|Kangxi]] 61st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1722|1722]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Kangxi Emperor,<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] {{ill|Encyclopædia Britannica|ja|Encyclopædia Britannica|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Encyclopædia Britannica|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ブリタニカ百科事典|1=Encyclopædia Britannica|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q455}}</ref> the 4th Emperor of the Qing dynasty (born [[:en:1654|1654]]). * {{ill|Genji|ja|Genji|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – Fukuhara Motomasa (also known as Fukuhara Echigo), chief retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1815|1815]]).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|12|11|14|10|13|12|11|1113|qq=}}
== References == {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:November 13 (Lunisolar)]]

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|Tenshō|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1574|1574]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]]) – Kobayakawa Shigehira, Sengoku daimyo (born [[:en:1542|1542]]). * [[:en:Kangxi|Kangxi]] 61st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1722|1722]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Kangxi Emperor,<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] {{ill|Encyclopædia Britannica|ja|Encyclopædia Britannica|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Encyclopædia Britannica|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ブリタニカ百科事典|1=Encyclopædia Britannica|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q455}}</ref> the 4th Emperor of the Qing dynasty (born [[:en:1654|1654]]). * {{ill|Genji|ja|Genji|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – Fukuhara Motomasa (also known as Fukuhara Echigo), chief retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1815|1815]]).

revision.comment: Text replacement - "zh min nan:" to "zh-min-nan:"
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 13일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月十三]][[zh:十一月十三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840090]] Wikidata name: 13th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 13|qq=November 13}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 13''' is the 13th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11th Month (Old Calendar)|1=November (Lunisolar)|2=ja|3=11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|Old Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyo|ja|Rokuyo|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|Taian|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Yūryaku|Emperor Yūryaku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:456|456]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – In the 1st year of Emperor Yūryaku, the 21st Emperor Yūryaku acceded to the throne. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1695|1695]] [[:en:December 18|December 18]]) – In accordance with the Edict on Compassion for Living Beings, a doghouse covering 160,000 tsubo was constructed in Musashi-Nakano Village to shelter stray dogs. * {{ill|Huangdi Era|ja|黄帝紀元|nl|Chinese_jaartelling|zh-min-nan|Hông-tè_kì-goân|zh-classical|黃帝紀元|zh|黄帝纪元|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Huangdi Era|qq=|1=Huangdi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3476000}} 4609th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1912|1912]] [[:en:January 1|January 1]]) – In the Republic of China, the calendar was reformed from the lunisolar to the Gregorian system and the Minguo era began.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1537|1537]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]) – Ashikaga Yoshiaki, the 15th Shogun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (d. [[:en:1597|1597]]). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1563|1563]] [[:en:November 28|November 28]]) – Hosokawa Tadaoki, military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|Military Commander|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and Daimyo; the first lord of the Ogura Domain (d. [[:en:1646|1646]] {{Sfn|永尾|p=178|qq=}}). * {{ill|Meireki|ja|Meireki|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meireki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1656|1656]] [[:en:December 28|December 28]]) – Azumi Tanpaku, Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|Confucian Scholar|zh|儒生|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) (d. [[:en:1738|1738]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Yamashita Yoshitaro ({{ill|Yamashita Yoshitaro|ja|山下芳太郎|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamashita Yoshitaro|qq=|1=Yoshitarō Yamashita|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6282623}}), founder of Kanamojikai ({{ill|Kanamojikai|ja|カナモジカイ|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanamojikai|qq=|1=Kanamozikai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11294454}}) (d. [[:en:1923|1923]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|Tenshō|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1574|1574]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]]) – Kobayakawa Shigehira, Sengoku daimyo (born [[:en:1542|1542]]). * [[:en:Kangxi|Kangxi]] 61st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1722|1722]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Kangxi Emperor,<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] {{ill|Encyclopædia Britannica|ja|Encyclopædia Britannica|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Encyclopædia Britannica|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ブリタニカ百科事典|1=Encyclopædia Britannica|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q455}}</ref> the 4th Emperor of the Qing dynasty (born [[:en:1654|1654]]). * {{ill|Genji|ja|Genji|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – Fukuhara Motomasa (also known as Fukuhara Echigo), chief retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1815|1815]]).
== Commemorations ==

[[:en:1646|1646]] {{Sfn|永尾|p=178|qq=}}). * {{ill|Meireki|ja|Meireki|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meireki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1656|1656]] [[:en:December 28|December 28]]) – Azumi Tanpaku, Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|Confucian Scholar|zh|儒生|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) (d. [[:en:1738|1738]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Yamashita Yoshitaro ({{ill|Yamashita Yoshitaro|ja|山下芳太郎|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamashita Yoshitaro|qq=|1=Yoshitarō Yamashita|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6282623}}), founder of Kanamojikai ({{ill|Kanamojikai|ja|カナモジカイ|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanamojikai|qq=|1=Kanamozikai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11294454}}) (d. [[:en:1923|1923]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|Tenshō|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1574|1574]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]]) – Kobayakawa Shigehira, Sengoku daimyo (born [[:en:1542|1542]]). * [[:en:Kangxi|Kangxi]] 61st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1722|1722]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Kangxi Emperor,<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] {{ill|Encyclopædia Britannica|ja|Encyclopædia Britannica|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Encyclopædia Britannica|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ブリタニカ百科事典|1=Encyclopædia Britannica|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q455}}</ref> the 4th Emperor of the Qing dynasty (born [[:en:1654|1654]]). * {{ill|Genji|ja|Genji|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – Fukuhara Motomasa (also known as Fukuhara Echigo), chief retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1815|1815]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 13일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十三]][[zh:十一月十三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840090]] Wikidata name: 13th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 13|qq=November 13}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 13''' is the 13th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11th Month (Old Calendar)|1=November (Lunisolar)|2=ja|3=11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|Old Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyo|ja|Rokuyo|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|Taian|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Yūryaku|Emperor Yūryaku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:456|456]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – In the 1st year of Emperor Yūryaku, the 21st Emperor Yūryaku acceded to the throne. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1695|1695]] [[:en:December 18|December 18]]) – In accordance with the Edict on Compassion for Living Beings, a doghouse covering 160,000 tsubo was constructed in Musashi-Nakano Village to shelter stray dogs. * {{ill|Huangdi Era|ja|黄帝紀元|nl|Chinese_jaartelling|zh-min-nan|Hông-tè_kì-goân|zh-classical|黃帝紀元|zh|黄帝纪元|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Huangdi Era|1=Huangdi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3476000}} 4609th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1912|1912]] [[:en:January 1|January 1]]) – In the Republic of China, the calendar was reformed from the lunisolar to the Gregorian system and the Minguo era began.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1537|1537]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]) – Ashikaga Yoshiaki, the 15th Shogun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (d. [[:en:1597|1597]]). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1563|1563]] [[:en:November 28|November 28]]) – Hosokawa Tadaoki, military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|Military Commander|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and Daimyo; the first lord of the Ogura Domain (d. [[:en:1646|1646]] {{Sfn|永尾|p=178|qq=}}). * {{ill|Meireki|ja|Meireki|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meireki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1656|1656]] [[:en:December 28|December 28]]) – Azumi Tanpaku, Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|Confucian Scholar|zh|儒生|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) (d. [[:en:1738|1738]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Yamashita Yoshitaro ({{ill|Yamashita Yoshitaro|ja|山下芳太郎|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamashita Yoshitaro|1=Yoshitarō Yamashita|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6282623}}), founder of Kanamojikai ({{ill|Kanamojikai|ja|カナモジカイ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanamojikai|1=Kanamozikai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11294454}}) (d. [[:en:1923|1923]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|Tenshō|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1574|1574]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]]) – Kobayakawa Shigehira, Sengoku daimyo (born [[:en:1542|1542]]). * [[:en:Kangxi|Kangxi]] 61st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1722|1722]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Kangxi Emperor,<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] {{ill|Encyclopædia Britannica|ja|Encyclopædia Britannica|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Encyclopædia Britannica|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ブリタニカ百科事典|1=Encyclopædia Britannica|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q455}}</ref> the 4th Emperor of the Qing dynasty (born [[:en:1654|1654]]). * {{ill|Genji|ja|Genji|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – Fukuhara Motomasa (also known as Fukuhara Echigo), chief retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1815|1815]]).

[[:en:1646|1646]] {{Sfn|永尾|p=178|qq=}}). * {{ill|Meireki|ja|Meireki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meireki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1656|1656]] [[:en:December 28|December 28]]) – Azumi Tanpaku, Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|Confucian Scholar|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) (d. [[:en:1738|1738]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Yamashita Yoshitaro ({{ill|Yamashita Yoshitaro|ja|山下芳太郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamashita Yoshitaro|1=Yoshitarō Yamashita|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6282623}}), founder of Kanamojikai ({{ill|Kanamojikai|ja|カナモジカイ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanamojikai|1=Kanamozikai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11294454}}) (d. <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 13일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十三]][[zh:十一月十三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840090]] Wikidata name: 13th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 13|qq=November 13}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 13''' is the 13th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11th Month (Old Calendar)|1=November (Lunisolar)|2=ja|3=11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|Old Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyo|ja|Rokuyo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|Taian|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Yūryaku|Emperor Yūryaku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:456|456]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – In the 1st year of Emperor Yūryaku, the 21st Emperor Yūryaku acceded to the throne. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1695|1695]] [[:en:December 18|December 18]]) – In accordance with the Edict on Compassion for Living Beings, a doghouse covering 160,000 tsubo was constructed in Musashi-Nakano Village to shelter stray dogs. * {{ill|Huangdi Era|ja|黄帝紀元|nl|Chinese_jaartelling|zh-min-nan|Hông-tè_kì-goân|zh-classical|黃帝紀元|zh|黄帝纪元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Huangdi Era|1=Huangdi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3476000}} 4609th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1912|1912]] [[:en:January 1|January 1]]) – In the Republic of China, the calendar was reformed from the lunisolar to the Gregorian system and the Minguo era began.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1537|1537]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]) – Ashikaga Yoshiaki, the 15th Shogun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (d. [[:en:1597|1597]]). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1563|1563]] [[:en:November 28|November 28]]) – Hosokawa Tadaoki, military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|Military Commander|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and Daimyo; the first lord of the Ogura Domain (d. [[:en:1646|1646]] {{Sfn|永尾|p=178|qq=}}). * {{ill|Meireki|ja|Meireki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meireki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1656|1656]] [[:en:December 28|December 28]]) – Azumi Tanpaku, Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|Confucian Scholar|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) (d. [[:en:1738|1738]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Yamashita Yoshitaro ({{ill|Yamashita Yoshitaro|ja|山下芳太郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamashita Yoshitaro|1=Yoshitarō Yamashita|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6282623}}), founder of Kanamojikai ({{ill|Kanamojikai|ja|カナモジカイ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanamojikai|1=Kanamozikai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11294454}}) (d. [[:en:1923|1923]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|Tenshō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1574|1574]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]]) – Kobayakawa Shigehira, Sengoku daimyo (born [[:en:1542|1542]]). * [[:en:Kangxi|Kangxi]] 61st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1722|1722]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Kangxi Emperor,<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] {{ill|Encyclopædia Britannica|ja|Encyclopædia Britannica|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Encyclopædia Britannica|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ブリタニカ百科事典|1=Encyclopædia Britannica|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q455}}</ref> the 4th Emperor of the Qing dynasty (born [[:en:1654|1654]]). * {{ill|Genji|ja|Genji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – Fukuhara Motomasa (also known as Fukuhara Echigo), chief retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1815|1815]]).

== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Yūryaku|Emperor Yūryaku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:456|456]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – In the 1st year of Emperor Yūryaku, the 21st Emperor Yūryaku acceded to the throne. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1695|1695]] [[:en:December 18|December 18]]) – In accordance with the Edict on Compassion for Living Beings, a doghouse covering 160,000 tsubo was constructed in Musashi-Nakano Village to shelter stray dogs. * {{ill|Huangdi Era|ja|黄帝紀元|nl|Chinese_jaartelling|zh-min-nan|Hông-tè_kì-goân|zh-classical|黃帝紀元|zh|黄帝纪元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Huangdi Era|1=Huangdi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3476000}} 4609th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1912|1912]] [[:en:January 1|January 1]]) – In the Republic of China, the calendar was reformed from the lunisolar to the Gregorian system and the Minguo era began.

[[:en:1738|1738]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Yamashita Yoshitaro ({{ill|Yamashita Yoshitaro|ja|山下芳太郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamashita Yoshitaro|1=Yoshitarō Yamashita|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6282623}}), founder of Kanamojikai ({{ill|Kanamojikai|ja|カナモジカイ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanamojikai|1=Kanamozikai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11294454}}) (d. [[:en:1923|1923]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 13일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十三]][[zh:十一月十三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840090]] Wikidata name: 13th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 13|qq=November 13}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 13''' is the 13th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11th Month (Old Calendar)|1=November (Lunisolar)|2=ja|3=11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|Old Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyo|ja|Rokuyo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|Taian|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Yūryaku|Emperor Yūryaku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:456|456]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – In the 1st year of Emperor Yūryaku, the 21st Emperor Yūryaku acceded to the throne. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1695|1695]] [[:en:December 18|December 18]]) – In accordance with the Edict on Compassion for Living Beings, a doghouse covering 160,000 tsubo was constructed in Musashi-Nakano Village to shelter stray dogs. * {{ill|Huangdi Era|ja|黄帝紀元|nl|Chinese_jaartelling|zh-min-nan|Hông-tè_kì-goân|zh-classical|黃帝紀元|zh|黄帝纪元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Huangdi Era|1=Huangdi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3476000}} 4609th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1912|1912]] [[:en:January 1|January 1]]) – In the Republic of China, the calendar was reformed from the lunisolar to the Gregorian system and the Minguo era began.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1537|1537]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]) – Ashikaga Yoshiaki, the 15th Shogun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (d. [[:en:1597|1597]]). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1563|1563]] [[:en:November 28|November 28]]) – Hosokawa Tadaoki, military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|Military Commander|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and Daimyo; the first lord of the Ogura Domain (d. [[:en:1646|1646]] {{Sfn|永尾|p=178|qq=}}). * {{ill|Meireki|ja|Meireki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meireki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1656|1656]] [[:en:December 28|December 28]]) – Azumi Tanpaku, Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|Confucian Scholar|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) (d. [[:en:1738|1738]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Yamashita Yoshitaro ({{ill|Yamashita Yoshitaro|ja|山下芳太郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamashita Yoshitaro|1=Yoshitarō Yamashita|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6282623}}), founder of Kanamojikai ({{ill|Kanamojikai|ja|カナモジカイ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanamojikai|1=Kanamozikai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11294454}}) (d. [[:en:1923|1923]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|Tenshō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1574|1574]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]]) – Kobayakawa Shigehira, Sengoku daimyo (born [[:en:1542|1542]]). * [[:en:Kangxi|Kangxi]] 61st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1722|1722]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Kangxi Emperor,<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] {{ill|Encyclopædia Britannica|ja|Encyclopædia Britannica|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Encyclopædia Britannica|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ブリタニカ百科事典|1=Encyclopædia Britannica|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q455}}</ref> the 4th Emperor of the Qing dynasty (born [[:en:1654|1654]]). * {{ill|Genji|ja|Genji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – Fukuhara Motomasa (also known as Fukuhara Echigo), chief retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1815|1815]]).

[[:en:1646|1646]] {{Sfn|永尾|p=178|qq=}}). * {{ill|Meireki|ja|Meireki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meireki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1656|1656]] [[:en:December 28|December 28]]) – Azumi Tanpaku, Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|Confucian Scholar|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) (d. [[:en:1738|1738]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Yamashita Yoshitaro ({{ill|Yamashita Yoshitaro|ja|山下芳太郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamashita Yoshitaro|1=Yoshitarō Yamashita|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6282623}}), founder of Kanamojikai ({{ill|Kanamojikai|ja|カナモジカイ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanamojikai|1=Kanamozikai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11294454}}) (d. [[:en:1923|1923]]).
