<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 13일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十三]][[zh:十一月十三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840090]] Wikidata name: 13th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 13|qq=November 13}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 13''' is the 13th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11th Month (Old Calendar)|1=November (Lunisolar)|2=ja|3=11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|Old Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyo|ja|Rokuyo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|Taian|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Yūryaku|Emperor Yūryaku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:456|456]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – In the 1st year of Emperor Yūryaku, the 21st Emperor Yūryaku acceded to the throne. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1695|1695]] [[:en:December 18|December 18]]) – In accordance with the Edict on Compassion for Living Beings, a doghouse covering 160,000 tsubo was constructed in Musashi-Nakano Village to shelter stray dogs. * {{ill|Huangdi Era|ja|黄帝紀元|nl|Chinese_jaartelling|zh-min-nan|Hông-tè_kì-goân|zh-classical|黃帝紀元|zh|黄帝纪元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Huangdi Era|1=Huangdi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3476000}} 4609th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1912|1912]] [[:en:January 1|January 1]]) – In the Republic of China, the calendar was reformed from the lunisolar to the Gregorian system and the Minguo era began.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1537|1537]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]) – Ashikaga Yoshiaki, the 15th Shogun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (d. [[:en:1597|1597]]). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1563|1563]] [[:en:November 28|November 28]]) – Hosokawa Tadaoki, military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|Military Commander|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and Daimyo; the first lord of the Ogura Domain (d. [[:en:1646|1646]] {{Sfn|永尾|p=178|qq=}}). * {{ill|Meireki|ja|Meireki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meireki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1656|1656]] [[:en:December 28|December 28]]) – Azumi Tanpaku, Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|Confucian Scholar|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) (d. [[:en:1738|1738]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Yamashita Yoshitaro ({{ill|Yamashita Yoshitaro|ja|山下芳太郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamashita Yoshitaro|1=Yoshitarō Yamashita|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6282623}}), founder of Kanamojikai ({{ill|Kanamojikai|ja|カナモジカイ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanamojikai|1=Kanamozikai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11294454}}) (d. [[:en:1923|1923]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|Tenshō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1574|1574]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]]) – Kobayakawa Shigehira, Sengoku daimyo (born [[:en:1542|1542]]). * [[:en:Kangxi|Kangxi]] 61st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1722|1722]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Kangxi Emperor,<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] {{ill|Encyclopædia Britannica|ja|Encyclopædia Britannica|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Encyclopædia Britannica|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ブリタニカ百科事典|1=Encyclopædia Britannica|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q455}}</ref> the 4th Emperor of the Qing dynasty (born [[:en:1654|1654]]). * {{ill|Genji|ja|Genji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – Fukuhara Motomasa (also known as Fukuhara Echigo), chief retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1815|1815]]).

[[:en:1597|1597]]). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1563|1563]] [[:en:November 28|November 28]]) – Hosokawa Tadaoki, military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|Military Commander|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and Daimyo; the first lord of the Ogura Domain (d. [[:en:1646|1646]] {{Sfn|永尾|p=178|qq=}}). * {{ill|Meireki|ja|Meireki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meireki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1656|1656]] [[:en:December 28|December 28]]) – Azumi Tanpaku, Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|Confucian Scholar|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) (d. [[:en:1738|1738]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Yamashita Yoshitaro ({{ill|Yamashita Yoshitaro|ja|山下芳太郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamashita Yoshitaro|1=Yoshitarō Yamashita|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6282623}}), founder of Kanamojikai ({{ill|Kanamojikai|ja|カナモジカイ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanamojikai|1=Kanamozikai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11294454}}) (d. [[:en:1923|1923]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|Tenshō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1574|1574]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]]) – Kobayakawa Shigehira, Sengoku daimyo (born [[:en:1542|1542]]). * [[:en:Kangxi|Kangxi]] 61st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1722|1722]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Kangxi Emperor,<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] {{ill|Encyclopædia Britannica|ja|Encyclopædia Britannica|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Encyclopædia Britannica|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ブリタニカ百科事典|1=Encyclopædia Britannica|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q455}}</ref> the 4th Emperor of the Qing dynasty (born [[:en:1654|1654]]). * {{ill|Genji|ja|Genji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – Fukuhara Motomasa (also known as Fukuhara Echigo), chief retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1815|1815]]).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 13''' is the 13th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11th Month (Old Calendar)|1=November (Lunisolar)|2=ja|3=11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|Old Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyo|ja|Rokuyo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|Taian|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Yūryaku|Emperor Yūryaku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:456|456]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – In the 1st year of Emperor Yūryaku, the 21st Emperor Yūryaku acceded to the throne. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1695|1695]] [[:en:December 18|December 18]]) – In accordance with the Edict on Compassion for Living Beings, a doghouse covering 160,000 tsubo was constructed in Musashi-Nakano Village to shelter stray dogs. * {{ill|Huangdi Era|ja|黄帝紀元|nl|Chinese_jaartelling|zh-min-nan|Hông-tè_kì-goân|zh-classical|黃帝紀元|zh|黄帝纪元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Huangdi Era|1=Huangdi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3476000}} 4609th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1912|1912]] [[:en:January 1|January 1]]) – In the Republic of China, the calendar was reformed from the lunisolar to the Gregorian system and the Minguo era began.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1537|1537]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]) – Ashikaga Yoshiaki, the 15th Shogun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (d. [[:en:1597|1597]]). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1563|1563]] [[:en:November 28|November 28]]) – Hosokawa Tadaoki, military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|Military Commander|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and Daimyo; the first lord of the Ogura Domain (d. [[:en:1646|1646]] {{Sfn|永尾|p=178|qq=}}). * {{ill|Meireki|ja|Meireki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meireki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1656|1656]] [[:en:December 28|December 28]]) – Azumi Tanpaku, Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|Confucian Scholar|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) (d. [[:en:1738|1738]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Yamashita Yoshitaro ({{ill|Yamashita Yoshitaro|ja|山下芳太郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamashita Yoshitaro|1=Yoshitarō Yamashita|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6282623}}), founder of Kanamojikai ({{ill|Kanamojikai|ja|カナモジカイ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanamojikai|1=Kanamozikai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11294454}}) (d. [[:en:1923|1923]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|Tenshō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1574|1574]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]]) – Kobayakawa Shigehira, Sengoku daimyo (born [[:en:1542|1542]]). * [[:en:Kangxi|Kangxi]] 61st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1722|1722]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Kangxi Emperor,<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] {{ill|Encyclopædia Britannica|ja|Encyclopædia Britannica|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Encyclopædia Britannica|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ブリタニカ百科事典|1=Encyclopædia Britannica|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q455}}</ref> the 4th Emperor of the Qing dynasty (born [[:en:1654|1654]]). * {{ill|Genji|ja|Genji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – Fukuhara Motomasa (also known as Fukuhara Echigo), chief retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1815|1815]]).
== Commemorations ==

revision.comment: Text replacement - "zh_min_nan" to "zh-min-nan"
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 13일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月十三]][[zh:十一月十三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 13일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月十三]][[zh:十一月十三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 13일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十三]][[zh:十一月十三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840090]] Wikidata name: 13th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 13|qq=November 13}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 13''' is the 13th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11th Month (Old Calendar)|1=November (Lunisolar)|2=ja|3=11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|Old Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyo|ja|Rokuyo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|Taian|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Yūryaku|Emperor Yūryaku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:456|456]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – In the 1st year of Emperor Yūryaku, the 21st Emperor Yūryaku acceded to the throne. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1695|1695]] [[:en:December 18|December 18]]) – In accordance with the Edict on Compassion for Living Beings, a doghouse covering 160,000 tsubo was constructed in Musashi-Nakano Village to shelter stray dogs. * {{ill|Huangdi Era|ja|黄帝紀元|nl|Chinese_jaartelling|zh-min-nan|Hông-tè_kì-goân|zh-classical|黃帝紀元|zh|黄帝纪元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Huangdi Era|1=Huangdi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3476000}} 4609th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1912|1912]] [[:en:January 1|January 1]]) – In the Republic of China, the calendar was reformed from the lunisolar to the Gregorian system and the Minguo era began.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1537|1537]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]) – Ashikaga Yoshiaki, the 15th Shogun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (d. [[:en:1597|1597]]). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1563|1563]] [[:en:November 28|November 28]]) – Hosokawa Tadaoki, military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|Military Commander|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and Daimyo; the first lord of the Ogura Domain (d. [[:en:1646|1646]] {{Sfn|永尾|p=178|qq=}}). * {{ill|Meireki|ja|Meireki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meireki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1656|1656]] [[:en:December 28|December 28]]) – Azumi Tanpaku, Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|Confucian Scholar|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) (d. [[:en:1738|1738]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Yamashita Yoshitaro ({{ill|Yamashita Yoshitaro|ja|山下芳太郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamashita Yoshitaro|1=Yoshitarō Yamashita|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6282623}}), founder of Kanamojikai ({{ill|Kanamojikai|ja|カナモジカイ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanamojikai|1=Kanamozikai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11294454}}) (d. [[:en:1923|1923]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|Tenshō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1574|1574]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]]) – Kobayakawa Shigehira, Sengoku daimyo (born [[:en:1542|1542]]). * [[:en:Kangxi|Kangxi]] 61st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1722|1722]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Kangxi Emperor,<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] {{ill|Encyclopædia Britannica|ja|Encyclopædia Britannica|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Encyclopædia Britannica|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ブリタニカ百科事典|1=Encyclopædia Britannica|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q455}}</ref> the 4th Emperor of the Qing dynasty (born [[:en:1654|1654]]). * {{ill|Genji|ja|Genji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – Fukuhara Motomasa (also known as Fukuhara Echigo), chief retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1815|1815]]).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|12|11|14|10|13|12|11|1113|qq=}}

== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Yūryaku|en|Emperor Yūryaku|WD=Q357235|lt=Emperor Yūryaku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|456|en|456|WD=Q30432|lt=456}} {{ill|December 25|en|December 25|WD=Q2745|lt=December 25}}) – In the 1st year of Emperor Yūryaku, the 21st Emperor Yūryaku acceded to the throne. * {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|WD=Q1325001|lt=Genroku}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1695|en|1695|WD=Q7696|lt=1695}} {{ill|December 18|en|December 18|WD=Q2438|lt=December 18}}) – In accordance with the Edict on Compassion for Living Beings, a doghouse covering 160,000 tsubo was constructed in Musashi-Nakano Village to shelter stray dogs. * {{ill|Huangdi Era|ja|黄帝紀元|nl|Chinese_jaartelling|zh-min-nan|Hông-tè_kì-goân|zh-classical|黃帝紀元|zh|黄帝纪元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Huangdi Era|1=Huangdi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3476000}} 4609th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1912|en|1912|WD=Q2077|lt=1912}} {{ill|January 1|en|January 1|WD=Q2150|lt=January 1}}) – In the Republic of China, the calendar was reformed from the lunisolar to the Gregorian system and the Minguo era began.

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|Tenshō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1574|en|1574|WD=Q6680|lt=1574}} {{ill|November 26|en|November 26|WD=Q3019|lt=November 26}}) – Kobayakawa Shigehira, Sengoku daimyo (born {{ill|1542|en|1542|WD=Q6520|lt=1542}}). * [[:en:Kangxi|Kangxi]] 61st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1722|en|1722|WD=Q6918|lt=1722}} {{ill|December 20|en|December 20|WD=Q2455|lt=December 20}}) – Kangxi Emperor,<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] {{ill|Encyclopædia Britannica|ja|Encyclopædia Britannica|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Encyclopædia Britannica|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ブリタニカ百科事典|1=Encyclopædia Britannica|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q455}}</ref> the 4th Emperor of the Qing dynasty (born {{ill|1654|en|1654|WD=Q6970|lt=1654}}). * {{ill|Genji|ja|Genji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1864|en|1864|WD=Q7704|lt=1864}} {{ill|December 11|en|December 11|WD=Q2363|lt=December 11}}) – Fukuhara Motomasa (also known as Fukuhara Echigo), chief retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born {{ill|1815|en|1815|WD=Q6948|lt=1815}}).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 13일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十三]][[zh:十一月十三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 13일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十三]][[zh:十一月十三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 13일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十三]][[zh:十一月十三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840090]] Wikidata name: 13th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 13|qq=November 13}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 13''' is the 13th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11th Month (Old Calendar)|1=November (Lunisolar)|2=ja|3=11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|Old Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyo|ja|Rokuyo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|Taian|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Yūryaku|en|Emperor Yūryaku|WD=Q357235|lt=Emperor Yūryaku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|456|en|456|WD=Q30432|lt=456}} {{ill|December 25|en|December 25|WD=Q2745|lt=December 25}}) – In the 1st year of Emperor Yūryaku, the 21st Emperor Yūryaku acceded to the throne. * {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|WD=Q1325001|lt=Genroku}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1695|en|1695|WD=Q7696|lt=1695}} {{ill|December 18|en|December 18|WD=Q2438|lt=December 18}}) – In accordance with the Edict on Compassion for Living Beings, a doghouse covering 160,000 tsubo was constructed in Musashi-Nakano Village to shelter stray dogs. * {{ill|Huangdi Era|ja|黄帝紀元|nl|Chinese_jaartelling|zh-min-nan|Hông-tè_kì-goân|zh-classical|黃帝紀元|zh|黄帝纪元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Huangdi Era|1=Huangdi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3476000}} 4609th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1912|en|1912|WD=Q2077|lt=1912}} {{ill|January 1|en|January 1|WD=Q2150|lt=January 1}}) – In the Republic of China, the calendar was reformed from the lunisolar to the Gregorian system and the Minguo era began.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenbun|en|Tenbun|WD=Q1192853|lt=Tenbun}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1537|en|1537|WD=Q6461|lt=1537}} {{ill|December 15|en|December 15|WD=Q2383|lt=December 15}}) – Ashikaga Yoshiaki, the 15th Shogun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (d. {{ill|1597|en|1597|WD=Q6790|lt=1597}}). * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|WD=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1563|en|1563|WD=Q6629|lt=1563}} {{ill|November 28|en|November 28|WD=Q3017|lt=November 28}}) – Hosokawa Tadaoki, military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|Military Commander|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and Daimyo; the first lord of the Ogura Domain (d. {{ill|1646|en|1646|WD=Q6930|lt=1646}} {{Sfn|永尾|p=178|qq=}}). * {{ill|Meireki|ja|Meireki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meireki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1656|en|1656|WD=Q6982|lt=1656}} {{ill|December 28|en|December 28|WD=Q2832|lt=December 28}}) – Azumi Tanpaku, Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|Confucian Scholar|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) (d. {{ill|1738|en|1738|WD=Q6996|lt=1738}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} {{ill|December 24|en|December 24|WD=Q2705|lt=December 24}}) – Yamashita Yoshitaro ({{ill|Yamashita Yoshitaro|ja|山下芳太郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamashita Yoshitaro|1=Yoshitarō Yamashita|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6282623}}), founder of Kanamojikai ({{ill|Kanamojikai|ja|カナモジカイ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanamojikai|1=Kanamozikai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11294454}}) (d. {{ill|1923|en|1923|WD=Q2169|lt=1923}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|Tenshō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1574|en|1574|WD=Q6680|lt=1574}} {{ill|November 26|en|November 26|WD=Q3019|lt=November 26}}) – Kobayakawa Shigehira, Sengoku daimyo (born {{ill|1542|en|1542|WD=Q6520|lt=1542}}). * [[:en:Kangxi|Kangxi]] 61st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1722|en|1722|WD=Q6918|lt=1722}} {{ill|December 20|en|December 20|WD=Q2455|lt=December 20}}) – Kangxi Emperor,<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] {{ill|Encyclopædia Britannica|ja|Encyclopædia Britannica|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Encyclopædia Britannica|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ブリタニカ百科事典|1=Encyclopædia Britannica|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q455}}</ref> the 4th Emperor of the Qing dynasty (born {{ill|1654|en|1654|WD=Q6970|lt=1654}}). * {{ill|Genji|ja|Genji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1864|en|1864|WD=Q7704|lt=1864}} {{ill|December 11|en|December 11|WD=Q2363|lt=December 11}}) – Fukuhara Motomasa (also known as Fukuhara Echigo), chief retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born {{ill|1815|en|1815|WD=Q6948|lt=1815}}).

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|Tenshō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1574|en|1574|WD=Q6680|lt=1574}} {{ill|November 26|en|November 26|WD=Q3019|lt=November 26}}) – Kobayakawa Shigehira, Sengoku daimyo (born {{ill|1542|en|1542|WD=Q6520|lt=1542}}). * [[:en:Kangxi|Kangxi]] 61st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1722|en|1722|WD=Q6918|lt=1722}} {{ill|December 20|en|December 20|WD=Q2455|lt=December 20}}) – Kangxi Emperor,<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] {{ill|Encyclopædia Britannica|ja|Encyclopædia Britannica|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Encyclopædia Britannica|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ブリタニカ百科事典|1=Encyclopædia Britannica|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q455}}</ref> the 4th Emperor of the Qing dynasty (born {{ill|1654|en|1654|WD=Q6970|lt=1654}}). * {{ill|Genji|ja|Genji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1864|en|1864|WD=Q7704|lt=1864}} {{ill|December 11|en|December 11|WD=Q2363|lt=December 11}}) – Fukuhara Motomasa (also known as Fukuhara Echigo), chief retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born {{ill|1815|en|1815|WD=Q6948|lt=1815}}).

Its {{ill|Rokuyo|ja|Rokuyo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|Taian|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

{{Not to be confused with|November 13|qq=November 13}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 13''' is the 13th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11th Month (Old Calendar)|1=November (Lunisolar)|2=ja|3=11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|Old Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyo|ja|Rokuyo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|Taian|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Yūryaku|en|Emperor Yūryaku|WD=Q357235|lt=Emperor Yūryaku|1=Emperor Yūryaku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|456|en|456|WD=Q30432|lt=456|1=456}} {{ill|December 25|en|December 25|WD=Q2745|lt=December 25|1=December 25}}) – In the 1st year of Emperor Yūryaku, the 21st Emperor Yūryaku acceded to the throne. * {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|WD=Q1325001|lt=Genroku|1=Genroku}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1695|en|1695|WD=Q7696|lt=1695|1=1695}} {{ill|December 18|en|December 18|WD=Q2438|lt=December 18|1=December 18}}) – In accordance with the Edict on Compassion for Living Beings, a doghouse covering 160,000 tsubo was constructed in Musashi-Nakano Village to shelter stray dogs. * {{ill|Huangdi Era|ja|黄帝紀元|nl|Chinese_jaartelling|zh-min-nan|Hông-tè_kì-goân|zh-classical|黃帝紀元|zh|黄帝纪元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Huangdi Era|1=Huangdi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3476000}} 4609th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1912|en|1912|WD=Q2077|lt=1912|1=1912}} {{ill|January 1|en|January 1|WD=Q2150|lt=January 1|1=January 1}}) – In the Republic of China, the calendar was reformed from the lunisolar to the Gregorian system and the Minguo era began.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenbun|en|Tenbun|WD=Q1192853|lt=Tenbun|1=Tenbun}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1537|en|1537|WD=Q6461|lt=1537|1=1537}} {{ill|December 15|en|December 15|WD=Q2383|lt=December 15|1=December 15}}) – Ashikaga Yoshiaki, the 15th Shogun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (d. {{ill|1597|en|1597|WD=Q6790|lt=1597|1=1597}}). * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|WD=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1563|en|1563|WD=Q6629|lt=1563|1=1563}} {{ill|November 28|en|November 28|WD=Q3017|lt=November 28|1=November 28}}) – Hosokawa Tadaoki, military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|Military Commander|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and Daimyo; the first lord of the Ogura Domain (d. {{ill|1646|en|1646|WD=Q6930|lt=1646|1=1646}} {{Sfn|永尾|p=178|qq=}}). * {{ill|Meireki|ja|Meireki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meireki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1656|en|1656|WD=Q6982|lt=1656|1=1656}} {{ill|December 28|en|December 28|WD=Q2832|lt=December 28|1=December 28}}) – Azumi Tanpaku, Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|Confucian Scholar|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) (d. {{ill|1738|en|1738|WD=Q6996|lt=1738|1=1738}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji|1=Meiji era}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} {{ill|December 24|en|December 24|WD=Q2705|lt=December 24|1=December 24}}) – Yamashita Yoshitaro ({{ill|Yamashita Yoshitaro|ja|山下芳太郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamashita Yoshitaro|1=Yoshitarō Yamashita|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6282623}}), founder of Kanamojikai ({{ill|Kanamojikai|ja|カナモジカイ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanamojikai|1=Kanamozikai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11294454}}) (d. {{ill|1923|en|1923|WD=Q2169|lt=1923|1=1923}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|Tenshō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1574|en|1574|WD=Q6680|lt=1574|1=1574}} {{ill|November 26|en|November 26|WD=Q3019|lt=November 26|1=November 26}}) – Kobayakawa Shigehira, Sengoku daimyo (born {{ill|1542|en|1542|WD=Q6520|lt=1542|1=1542}}). * [[:en:Kangxi|Kangxi]] 61st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1722|en|1722|WD=Q6918|lt=1722|1=1722}} {{ill|December 20|en|December 20|WD=Q2455|lt=December 20|1=December 20}}) – Kangxi Emperor,<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] {{ill|Encyclopædia Britannica|ja|Encyclopædia Britannica|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Encyclopædia Britannica|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ブリタニカ百科事典|1=Encyclopædia Britannica|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q455}}</ref> the 4th Emperor of the Qing dynasty (born {{ill|1654|en|1654|WD=Q6970|lt=1654|1=1654}}). * {{ill|Genji|ja|Genji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1864|en|1864|WD=Q7704|lt=1864|1=1864}} {{ill|December 11|en|December 11|WD=Q2363|lt=December 11|1=December 11}}) – Fukuhara Motomasa (also known as Fukuhara Echigo), chief retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born {{ill|1815|en|1815|WD=Q6948|lt=1815|1=1815}}).

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 13''' is the 13th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11th Month (Old Calendar)|1=November (Lunisolar)|2=ja|3=11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|Old Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyo|ja|Rokuyo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|Taian|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Yūryaku|en|Emperor Yūryaku|WD=Q357235|lt=Emperor Yūryaku|1=Emperor Yūryaku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|456|en|456|WD=Q30432|lt=456|1=456}} {{ill|December 25|en|December 25|WD=Q2745|lt=December 25|1=December 25}}) – In the 1st year of Emperor Yūryaku, the 21st Emperor Yūryaku acceded to the throne. * {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|WD=Q1325001|lt=Genroku|1=Genroku}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1695|en|1695|WD=Q7696|lt=1695|1=1695}} {{ill|December 18|en|December 18|WD=Q2438|lt=December 18|1=December 18}}) – In accordance with the Edict on Compassion for Living Beings, a doghouse covering 160,000 tsubo was constructed in Musashi-Nakano Village to shelter stray dogs. * {{ill|Huangdi Era|ja|黄帝紀元|nl|Chinese_jaartelling|zh-min-nan|Hông-tè_kì-goân|zh-classical|黃帝紀元|zh|黄帝纪元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Huangdi Era|1=Huangdi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3476000}} 4609th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1912|en|1912|WD=Q2077|lt=1912|1=1912}} {{ill|January 1|en|January 1|WD=Q2150|lt=January 1|1=January 1}}) – In the Republic of China, the calendar was reformed from the lunisolar to the Gregorian system and the Minguo era began.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenbun|en|Tenbun|WD=Q1192853|lt=Tenbun|1=Tenbun}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1537|en|1537|WD=Q6461|lt=1537|1=1537}} {{ill|December 15|en|December 15|WD=Q2383|lt=December 15|1=December 15}}) – Ashikaga Yoshiaki, the 15th Shogun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (d. {{ill|1597|en|1597|WD=Q6790|lt=1597|1=1597}}). * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|WD=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1563|en|1563|WD=Q6629|lt=1563|1=1563}} {{ill|November 28|en|November 28|WD=Q3017|lt=November 28|1=November 28}}) – Hosokawa Tadaoki, military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|Military Commander|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and Daimyo; the first lord of the Ogura Domain (d. {{ill|1646|en|1646|WD=Q6930|lt=1646|1=1646}} {{Sfn|永尾|p=178|qq=}}). * {{ill|Meireki|ja|Meireki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meireki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1656|en|1656|WD=Q6982|lt=1656|1=1656}} {{ill|December 28|en|December 28|WD=Q2832|lt=December 28|1=December 28}}) – Azumi Tanpaku, Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|Confucian Scholar|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) (d. {{ill|1738|en|1738|WD=Q6996|lt=1738|1=1738}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji|1=Meiji era}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} {{ill|December 24|en|December 24|WD=Q2705|lt=December 24|1=December 24}}) – Yamashita Yoshitaro ({{ill|Yamashita Yoshitaro|ja|山下芳太郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamashita Yoshitaro|1=Yoshitarō Yamashita|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6282623}}), founder of Kanamojikai ({{ill|Kanamojikai|ja|カナモジカイ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanamojikai|1=Kanamozikai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11294454}}) (d. {{ill|1923|en|1923|WD=Q2169|lt=1923|1=1923}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|Tenshō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1574|en|1574|WD=Q6680|lt=1574|1=1574}} {{ill|November 26|en|November 26|WD=Q3019|lt=November 26|1=November 26}}) – Kobayakawa Shigehira, Sengoku daimyo (born {{ill|1542|en|1542|WD=Q6520|lt=1542|1=1542}}). * [[:en:Kangxi|Kangxi]] 61st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1722|en|1722|WD=Q6918|lt=1722|1=1722}} {{ill|December 20|en|December 20|WD=Q2455|lt=December 20|1=December 20}}) – Kangxi Emperor,<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] {{ill|Encyclopædia Britannica|ja|Encyclopædia Britannica|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Encyclopædia Britannica|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ブリタニカ百科事典|1=Encyclopædia Britannica|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q455}}</ref> the 4th Emperor of the Qing dynasty (born {{ill|1654|en|1654|WD=Q6970|lt=1654|1=1654}}). * {{ill|Genji|ja|Genji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1864|en|1864|WD=Q7704|lt=1864|1=1864}} {{ill|December 11|en|December 11|WD=Q2363|lt=December 11|1=December 11}}) – Fukuhara Motomasa (also known as Fukuhara Echigo), chief retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born {{ill|1815|en|1815|WD=Q6948|lt=1815|1=1815}}).
